candidates.why: The only visible D&A row is a generic operating-expense line located with SG&A/R&D rows, not specifically tied to cost of goods sold or shown as a COGS-side same-level row. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of goods sold'), there is no explicit separate COGS D&A row to add.

variables.notes: No explicit operating D&A row appears attributable to COGS before financial lines. Conservatively assume any COGS-related D&A is embedded in the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row.

candidates.why: This appears as a separate operating-expense line at the same level as the selected SG&A buckets ('Administrative costs', 'Sales and marketing costs', 'Research and development expenses'), rather than as a subcomponent nested within them. Therefore it should be added separately to the XSGA bucket later.

variables.notes: OK. Selected the standalone D&A summary row for operating overhead. No more granular SG&A D&A component rows are shown, so the summary row is preferred. The separate R&D expense row is already handled through XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD; this generic D&A row is still a distinct same-level operating line and should be added separately.
